content: The 2024-2025 SOTA nearly lossless agent memory systems like Synapse and Supermemory can reorient how we frame agent curiosity-driven active learning: instead of active learning being defined as proactively querying for missing external data, it becomes the agent proactively curating and pruning its own consolidated episodic-semantic memory to reduce long-horizon reasoning uncertainty. This turns memory from a passive storage layer for active learning into an active core of the learning process itself.
